author: TheGreatWhite
content:
Ok...after getting tired of searching a bunch of different posts I decided to put this together for the V6 guys...sorry I-4's, maybe later. None the less I wanted to compile an all inclusive list of V6 headers and their gains and prices. I was also thinking about listing their material compositions but that was just too much info to try to find, I might update that later. If you see any blanks it's because I searched and searched and didn't find numbers for every one of these, so if you know them, shoot me a PM and I'll update the list as I receive them. I took the best of the information I could find out there so if this is inaccurate please let me know so I can fix! I'm sure that I might have missed a few out there but this was the list I came up with, again if you have additions please PM them to me!!!! I'll do my best to keep the list updated! The prices listed are not exact but approximations from a number of different locations so it's more of a guideline than anything on their REGULAR, not GB, prices.

Hope this is helpful! Maybe Sticky??

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
RIPP MOD's Long Tube Headers
Price: $1199.95
Estimated HP/TQ Gains: 15-20hp
Ceramic coated: No
Cat included: No
Equal length: No
O2 Bungs: Unlisted (I would guess all of them?)
Where to Buy: RIPP MODS

[IMAGE: RIPP MODs headers]

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Outcast Performance/Shark Racing Headers:
Price: $700/$850
Estimated HP/TQ Gains: +8HP (that's what Outcast told me)
Ceramic coated: No
Cat included: No
Equal length: No
O2 Bungs: 1
Where to Buy: Outcast Performance or SharkRacing

[IMAGE: Outcast/Shark Racing headers]

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SFR - Seoulfulracing:
Price: $850 w/out Cat/$1130 w/ race cat
Estimated HP/TQ Gains: 20-25HP
Ceramic coated: No
Cat included: Optional Race Cat $280
Equal length: No
O2 Bungs: All necessary bungs can be added
Where to Buy: Seoulful Racing

[IMAGE: SFR headers]

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

author: tibguy03
content: You need to remove the RIPP Mods headers from that list because they have no headers in production and have absolutely no time frame for getting headers into production. Anyone hoping to get a hold of them is SOL unless you can find one of the ten prototype sets that were sold.

author: Haiduc
content: Tibguy is right. I was lucky enough to get ahold of one of the prototypes, but I had a hard time doing so, and as far as RIPPMods.com, they arent even in the product line.

author: TheGreatWhite
content: Yeah...I noticed that when I was look'n around. As already mentioned I believe they are going to try to get more out but I have changed those to now show as "Unavailable". I'm hope'n to get more info to add to each of the systems to make it more informative...but not matter where I look, nobody has HP/TQ ratings...you'd think they would have those things on the manufactures site!

author: Bosco
content:
AFAIK, the Hotshots are the only ones that are truly equal-length. That's why I decided to go with them on my car.

I agree with George. If the Ripp headers are going to be displayed, so should the Key headers. Key actually sold theirs at one time, though, whereas Ripp basically never did. Key headers have dynoed higher than any other headers available for our cars. I am talking dyno proven, not dyno inferred like the Ripp ones.

Good idea for a thread. Information like this is essential to people planning their mods, which is the single most important step in my opinion.

author: TheGreatWhite
content: I can't find any info on the Key ones...so I might as well just pull the RIPP ones off the main post of the thread that way it's going to be only the "active" products out there....seems pointless to show people what they can't have anyway...

author: TheGreatWhite
content: Done...parts were taken and O2 bungs were added as well.....I was thinking about doing this in the first place just was hard to track down all the info. Either way...I'm going to keep refine'n this so please give me whatever info you have that needs updated!!!!
